name: Chocolate Turtle Cheesecake
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350 degrees F.
2. Combine the vanilla wafers and melted margarine in a bowl. Press this mixture into the bottom and sides of a 9-inch spring-form pan. Bake for 10 minutes.
3. In a heavy saucepan, melt the caramels with milk over low heat, stirring frequently until smooth. Pour this mixture over the crust.
4. Top with pecans.
5. In a separate bowl, beat the cream cheese, sugar, and vanilla until well blended. Add eggs one at a time, mixing well after each addition.
6. Blend in the chocolate chips and pour over the pecans.
7. Bake for 40 minutes.
8. Remove from the oven and let cool before removing the rim of the pan. Chill thoroughly.
9. Garnish with whipped cream, additional chopped nuts, and maraschino cherries if desired.
